welcome.content: Welcome to your hormone therapy journey! I'll be here to support you every step of the way.

medication_reminder.content: Don't forget to take your medication as prescribed.

progress_check.content: Let's check your progress this week.

completion.content: Congratulations! You've completed the first phase of your treatment.

day_16_45.name: Day 16-45 Flow
day_16_45.description: Extended hormone therapy flow for days 16-45

phase_two_welcome.content: Welcome to phase two of your treatment! Let's continue monitoring your progress.

enhanced_check_in.content: How has your body been responding to the treatment?

side_effects_monitor.content: Have you experienced any side effects?

lifestyle_check.content: Let's review your lifestyle and habits.

phase_completion.content: Excellent progress! You're ready for the next phase of treatment.

monthly.name: Monthly Maintenance Flow
monthly.description: Monthly maintenance flow for ongoing treatment

monthly_welcome.content: Time for your monthly check-in! Let's see how you're doing.

comprehensive_assessment.content: Let's do a comprehensive review of your health this month.

goal_review.content: How are you progressing toward your health goals?

next_month_prep.content: Great work this month! Let's prepare for continued success.
